$comment: Curated static example authored from the inventory. It is not generated by a runtime golden-flow execution.

transitions.conversationFiltering: Search and the status selector narrow the visible conversations; the view toggle switches the list between rows and a card grid. An empty result offers Clear filters.
transitions.conversationSelection: Selecting a conversation opens its message thread in the reading pane; with none selected the pane prompts the reader to choose one.
transitions.reply: Replying appends a message to the active thread, requires a non-empty body, reopens the conversation, and claims it for the operator when it was unassigned.
transitions.lifecycle: Assign toggles ownership between the operator and Unassigned; Snooze, Close, and Reopen move the conversation between its open, snoozed, and closed states from the list and the thread header.
transitions.conversationCreation: New conversation opens a Dialog requiring a non-empty sender, subject, and first message; submitting adds an open conversation to the top of the inbox and selects it.
transitions.inboxPersistence: Every reply, lifecycle change, and new conversation is saved to localStorage; reloading the page restores that saved inbox. Reset inbox discards it and restores the seed conversations.
